title: "item moved to group" automation not working
excerpt: I am using the Mandatory Fields app in my crm to validate and move an item to a group, however this automation doesn’t trigger my “item moved to group” automation that i have set up for the grup its moving to. Is this an…

posts.author: flowpresso (Max De Spong)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using the Mandatory Fields app in my crm to validate and move an item to a group, however this automation doesn’t trigger my “item moved to group” automation that i have set up for the grup its moving to. Is this an app problem on is monday just not recognising it as a moved item.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Max,

Sorry to hear this!

Is it possible to share a demonstration of the workflow so I can better understand what the expected behaviour would be? You’re welcome to share this via a private message if you’d prefer

posts.author: flowpresso (Max De Spong)
posts.cookedHtml: I have attached a link to a screenshot of the automations I an having issues with. The manditory fields automation works fine its just the “when item is moved to” automations that are not working. https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ce0Qi5ancfDHkgPZc8P-Svr6fhJprzQd/view?usp=sharing

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for sharing Max - I might need to take this with our technical team. That said, can I ask you to share a screenshot of the automations activity for the problematic recipes?

Screen Shot 2024-03-26 at 11.04.25 am1286×474 32.1 KB

To be totally transparent, I am not too familiar with the mandatory fields app - is it possible for you to send over a screen-recording (or screenshot) of the behaviour or the widget that’s in reference, so I can understand whether the integration should be triggering the native automation? As mentioned, you’re welcome to send this via a private message!
